prompt: A spacious room with a wooden floor and white walls. In the background, a classic round clock hangs on the wall. A real giraffe stands on the floor beside a dark wooden upright piano, next to a vase of colorful flowers placed on top of the piano. A man in a dark blue shirt stands behind the piano. In the center, an orange teddy bear sits on a beige sofa. In the foreground, there is a black road bicycle on the left, a round wooden table in the middle, and a black rolling suitcase on the right.
caption: A spacious room with a wooden floor and white walls. In the background, a classic round clock hangs on the wall. A real giraffe stands on the floor beside a dark wooden upright piano, next to a vase of colorful flowers placed on top of the piano. A man in a dark blue shirt stands behind the piano. In the center, an orange teddy bear sits on a beige sofa. In the foreground, there is a black road bicycle on the left, a round wooden table in the middle, and a black rolling suitcase on the right.

annos.caption: An orange teddy bear wearing a red bow tie.
a large stuffed giraffe stands on a dark wooden upright piano
